title: Zez-Kai Ell's Padawan

{{Quote|I, too, lost a Padawan on Malachor. Not to the battle, but to the alternative. To the teachings Revan brought from the Unknown Regions.|Zez-Kai Ell|<ref name="KotOR II game" />}}
A '''Padawan''' was [[Jedi training/Legends|apprenticed]] to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zez-Kai Ell]] prior the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. At some point during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] conflict with the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] joined the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] [[Revanchist|faction]] and entered the war. After the war's [[Battle of Malachor V|final battle]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malachor V]], Ell's Padawan fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], having been seduced by [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] teachings imparted to him by Revan, who had become a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].

==Biography==
[[File:Zezkaiell.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Zez-Kai Ell trained the Padawan prior to the Mandalorian Wars.]]
A [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] lived around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. The apprentice eventually came under the tutelage of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zez-Kai Ell]]. During the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] conflict with the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]], the apprentice joined the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] [[Revanchist|faction of Jedi]] and entered the war.<ref name="KotOR II game" /> In [[3960 BBY]],<ref name="KotOR CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> Ell's Padawan fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] after the war's [[Battle of Malachor V|final battle]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malachor V]]. The Padawan fell as a result of Sith teachings imparted by Revan, who had become the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] of a [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|new Sith Empire]].<ref name="KotOR II game" />

In [[3951 BBY]],<ref name="KotOR CG" /> Zez-Kai Ell recalled his Padawan's fall to the dark side in a conversation with<ref name="KotOR II game" /> [[Meetra Surik]],<ref name="Note 2">The character of the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]], the protagonist of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', was later confirmed to have been known as Meetra Surik in the novel ''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''.</ref> who had also participated in the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] Wars. In the conversation, Ell concluded that he knew why his Padawan followed Revan, stating that his apprentice had made the right choice to do so when so many others did not.<ref name="KotOR II game" />

==Personality and traits==
Zez-Kai Ell's Padawan was willing to join Revan in his crusade against the Mandalorians, who were invading the Republic. After the war's final battle, the apprentice was susceptible to corruption by Revan and fell to the dark side as a result.<ref name="KotOR II game" />

==Powers and abilities==
The Padawan was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to the Force and survived the Mandalorian Wars' final battle at Malachor V.<ref name="KotOR II game" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zez-Kai Ell's Padawan was first mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', developed by [[Obsidian Entertainment]]. The character is only mentioned in a conversation between Zez-Kai Ell and the player character.<ref name="KotOR II game" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
